name: pandastack
description: Personal AI operator OS: skill-only stack with 38 skills (tiered core/ext/personal via manifest.toml), 5 scenario flows (sprint / office-hours / boardroom / dojo / retro), 5 persona skills, 11 lib/ shared modules. Covers dev / knowledge / writing / work / research / retro / decision lifecycles with a learning loop.

interface.shortDescription: Personal AI operator OS for lifecycle workflows: dev, knowledge, writing, work, research, retro, decision.
interface.longDescription: Use Pandastack to guide work through 7 lifecycle flows with skills for careful gates, review, ship, knowledge extraction, parallel research, retros, and a self-evolving learning loop.
defaultPrompt: I want to start a new feature.
Let's review and ship this branch.
Help me close out this knowledge note.
